cross_eval_summary.critical_finding: Skill shows no net pass rate improvement despite higher cost. Core issue is misalignment between staged interaction protocol and evaluation expectations for complete output.
cross_eval_summary.pattern_identified: When user triggers direct-result mode, skill performs well (Eval 2). When staged mode is active, skill stops prematurely relative to eval expectations (Eval 1).
cross_eval_summary.value_proposition_risk: Skill adds token/time cost without improving pass rate. Must either improve pass rate or reduce cost to justify existence.

repair_recommendations.issue: Interaction protocol specifies step-by-step pauses, but eval expectations assume complete analysis output in single turn.
repair_recommendations.action: Align evaluation expectations with staged workflow OR modify skill to auto-complete all steps when information is sufficient (Step 0 detects 3+ items clear).
repair_recommendations.expected_impact: Resolve Eval 1 failure where skill correctly paused but eval marked strategy-guidance as failed.

repair_recommendations.issue: Output contract unclear on when full SWOT+strategy vs. partial step output is expected.
repair_recommendations.action: Clarify in skill spec: if Step 0 detects sufficient info, auto-execute Steps 1-4 in single output. If info insufficient, pause after Step 1.
repair_recommendations.expected_impact: Ensure strategy guidance is delivered when user provides adequate initial context.

repair_recommendations.issue: Cross-strategy analysis (SO/WO/ST/WT) not consistently generated in staged mode outputs.
repair_recommendations.action: Add explicit instruction: each step output must include preview of downstream strategy logic, even in staged mode.
repair_recommendations.expected_impact: Improve strategy-guidance expectation pass rate across all interaction modes.

repair_recommendations.issue: Eval expectations do not account for multi-turn staged workflow.
repair_recommendations.action: Update eval grading logic to either: (a) run multi-turn conversation simulation, or (b) only test direct-result mode scenarios.
repair_recommendations.expected_impact: Fair evaluation of skill's intended staged interaction design.
